hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push'; then BRANCH=$(cd /home/user/112 && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ]; then PR_URL="https://github.com/xopromo/112/compare/main...${BRANCH}"; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"После git push — свежая ссылка PR для мержа: %s"},"systemMessage":"🔗 PR: %s"}' "$PR_URL" "$PR_URL"; fi; fi
cd /home/user/112 && git pull --rebase origin main 2>&1 | tail -3; bash agent/restore_config.sh 2>&1; bash agent/restore_db.sh 2>&1
